title: Informational Interviews and Reality Testing · Career Evidence Case: Synthesis Limit
summary: A candidate schedules a conversation to ask for a hidden referral, asks generic questions available online, records without consent, and treats one opinion as market truth. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the synthesis limit increment in consented role-reality interview study. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Separate observation, practitioner interpretation, candidate inference, contradiction, and unanswered question across multiple sources.
Plan a short accessible conversation with neutral behavior questions, time consent, recording consent, and an easy stopping path.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Synthesis Limit · Theory Synthesis Limit
steps.instruction:
theory case — A nominal learning conversation hides a referral request, asks generic questions, records without consent, and generalizes one practitioner view to a whole market. The theory variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Separate observation, practitioner interpretation, candidate inference, contradiction, and unanswered question across multiple sources.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Synthesis Limit contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Synthesis Limit · Theory Synthesis Limit.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for separate observation, practitioner interpretation, candidate inference, contradiction, and unanswered question across multiple sources. For Predict Synthesis Limit · Theory Synthesis Limit, keep Synthesis Limit connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Synthesis Limit condition decided your prediction.

options.text: Separate observation, practitioner interpretation, candidate inference, contradiction, and unanswered question across multiple sources. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
One experienced person can validate an entire career plan. That claim fails the evidence boundary for Synthesis Limit.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A nominal learning conversation hides a referral request, asks generic questions, records without consent, and generalizes one practitioner view to a whole market. The worked example variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Separate observation, practitioner interpretation, candidate inference, contradiction, and unanswered question across multiple sources. A defensible solution applies Synthesis Limit, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to consented role-reality interview study.

content.code:
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-3
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: One experienced person can validate an entire career plan. This fails the Synthesis Limit contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate observation, practitioner interpretation, candidate inference, contradiction, and unanswered question across multiple sources.
